# Local YDB Toolkit Full Agent Context

Local YDB Toolkit is a public repository for AI-agent local-ydb workflows. It contains:

- `@astandrik/local-ydb-mcp`, a plan-first stdio MCP server for Docker-based local-ydb diagnostics, bootstrap, schema DDL, auth, storage, backup/restore, and upgrades.
- `skills/local-ydb`, a reusable Codex skill for operating local-ydb deployments safely.
- `astandrik/setup-local-ydb`, a GitHub Marketplace Action for disposable YDB tenants in CI.

## Main installation paths

MCP client config:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "local-ydb": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "--prefer-online", "@astandrik/local-ydb-mcp@latest"],
      "env": {
        "LOCAL_YDB_TOOLKIT_CONFIG": "/path/to/local-ydb.config.json",
        "LOCAL_YDB_MCP_CONTENT_FORMAT": "toon"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Codex skill install:

```text
$skill-installer install https://github.com/astandrik/local-ydb-toolkit/tree/main/skills/local-ydb
```

GitHub Actions local YDB:

```yaml
- uses: astandrik/setup-local-ydb@v1
  id: ydb
  with:
    version: 26.1.1.6
    tenant: /local/test
```

## Use @astandrik/local-ydb-mcp for

- local Docker and SSH-backed local-ydb profile inspection
- root database bootstrap
- CMS tenant and dynamic-node topology bootstrap
- YDB monitoring healthcheck diagnostics
- GraphShard, tenant, node, auth, scheme, and storage checks
- YDB table schema DDL generation, validation, and guarded application
- auth hardening
- storage group expansion or reduction planning
- dump, restore, cleanup, and version upgrades

Mutating MCP tools are plan-first and require `confirm: true` before execution.

## Use ydb-platform/ydb-mcp for

- ad hoc SQL
- query explanations
- directory listing and path inspection
- database-level interaction against an existing YDB endpoint

The two servers are complementary.

## Public pages

- Home: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/
- local-ydb-mcp vs ydb-mcp: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/local-ydb-mcp-vs-ydb-mcp.html
- setup-local-ydb for GitHub Actions: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/setup-local-ydb-github-actions.html
- Diagnostics with MCP tools: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/diagnose-local-ydb-mcp.html
- Safe YDB schema DDL: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/ydb-schema-ddl-mcp.html
- Best tools for local YDB AI-agent workflows: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/best-tools-local-ydb-ai-agents.html

## Important safety constraints

- Do not expose private hostnames, SSH keys, password files, tokens, private backup paths, or app-specific deployment details in public examples.
- Do not assume `/local` has GraphShard. Use a CMS-created tenant such as `/local/<tenant>` when GraphShard or tenant storage is required.
- Do not use SQL to create GraphShard tenants.
- Do not treat PostgreSQL compatibility environment variables as native YDB gRPC auth.
- Do not execute mutating MCP tools unless the exact plan has been reviewed and the tool call includes `confirm: true`.

## Note about this file

This file is an agent convenience index. It is not an AI search ranking mechanism and is not required by Google AI Overviews or AI Mode.
